Intro

I build things for FOSS

Developer that likes to work with C. I prefer FOSS and am very comitted to the development and use of software that ensure the privacy of its users. This blog is primarily to just post projects or techs that I think is cool.

See my work Get in touch

Work

Selected Projects

A few interesting things I've built.

CLI Tool

Audio Metadata Reader

Tool/Library that can read metadata from audio files. It can print the metadata onto the terminal and can also recreate embedded images for viewing.

GitHub →
Ncurses

Bad File Manager

TUI based file manager that somehow manages to work. Vim key-bindings are used for traversal.

GitHub →
Mobile App

Attendance App

Mobile application capable of running in both iOS and Android.

GitHub →
